source:
_pretenured_669254415_stringStreamContents: block "Like String streamContents: block
	but reusing the underlying buffer for improved efficiency"

	stringStream ifNil: [ stringStream := (String new: 32) writeStream ].
	stringStream reset.
	block value: stringStream.
	^ stringStream _pretenured_669254415_contents

_pretenured_669254415_readUnquotedField (self atEnd or: [ self peekSeparator or: [ self peekEndOfLine ] ])
		ifTrue: [ ^ emptyFieldValue ].
	^ self _pretenured_669254415_stringStreamContents: [ :stream |
			  [
			  self atEnd or: [ self peekSeparator or: [ self peekEndOfLine ] ] ]
				  whileFalse: [ stream nextPut: self nextChar ] ]

_pretenured_669254415_readNextRecordWithoutFieldAccessors: record 1 to: fieldCount do: [ :each |
			record at: each put: self _pretenured_669254415_readField.
			each = fieldCount ifFalse: [ self handleSeparator ] ]

_pretenured_669254415_readNextRecordAsArray fieldAccessors ifNotNil: [
		self fieldCount: (fieldAccessors count: [ :each | each notNil ]) ].
	^ fieldCount
		  ifNil: [
				  | record |
				  record := self readFirstRecord.
				  self fieldCount: record size.
				  record ]
		  ifNotNil: [ self _pretenured_669254415_readNextRecord ]

_pretenured_669254415_readNextRecord | record |
	record := self recordClassNew: fieldCount.
	fieldAccessors
		ifNil: [
			self _pretenured_669254415_readNextRecordWithoutFieldAccessors:
				record ]
		ifNotNil: [ self readNextRecordWithFieldAccessors: record ].
	self handleEndOfRecord.
	^ record

_pretenured_669254415_readField | field |
	field := self peekQuote
		         ifTrue: [ self readQuotedField ]
		         ifFalse: [ self _pretenured_669254415_readUnquotedField ].
	(field ~= emptyFieldValue and: [ emptyFieldInput notNil ]) ifTrue: [
		(emptyFieldInput value: field) ifTrue: [ ^ emptyFieldValue ] ].
	^ field

_pretenured_669254415_next "Read the next record.
	I will return an instance of recordClass."

	^ recordClassIsIndexable
		  ifTrue: [ self _pretenured_669254415_readNextRecordAsArray ]
		  ifFalse: [ self readNextRecordAsObject ]

_pretenured_669254415_copyFrom: start to: stop "Answer a copy of a subset of the receiver, starting from element at
	index start until element at index stop."

	| newSize |
	newSize := stop - start + 1.
	^ (self species newTenured: newSize)
		  replaceFrom: 1
		  to: newSize
		  with: self
		  startingAt: start

_pretenured_669254415_contents readLimit := readLimit max: position.
	^ collection _pretenured_669254415_copyFrom: 1 to: position

_pretenured_161555457_readNextRecordAsArray fieldAccessors ifNotNil: [
		self fieldCount: (fieldAccessors count: [ :each | each notNil ]) ].
	^ fieldCount
		  ifNil: [
				  | record |
				  record := self readFirstRecord.
				  self fieldCount: record size.
				  record ]
		  ifNotNil: [ self _pretenured_161555457_readNextRecord ]

_pretenured_161555457_readNextRecord | record |
	record := self _pretenured_161555457_recordClassNew: fieldCount.
	fieldAccessors
		ifNil: [ self readNextRecordWithoutFieldAccessors: record ]
		ifNotNil: [ self readNextRecordWithFieldAccessors: record ].
	self handleEndOfRecord.
	^ record

_pretenured_161555457_next "Read the next record.
	I will return an instance of recordClass."

	^ recordClassIsIndexable
		  ifTrue: [ self _pretenured_161555457_readNextRecordAsArray ]
		  ifFalse: [ self readNextRecordAsObject ]

readOnlyRowsWith: aReader rows := OrderedCollection new.

	[ aReader atEnd ] whileFalse: [
		rows add: aReader _pretenured_161555457_next ]

newTenured: sizeRequested "Return a new instance with the number of indexable variables specified by the argument."

	^ self == String
		  ifTrue: [ ByteString new: sizeRequested ]
		  ifFalse: [ self basicNewTenured: sizeRequested ]
